channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Nasdaq slides, heads for a losing week, as semiconductor stocks struggle: Live updates
item.description: The three major averages are heading for weekly losses, led by the tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite.

item.title: Trump considering a ‘massive attack’ on Iran as Tehran labels UK ‘accomplice’ to America
item.description: The president told Axios he was considering an operation "bigger than ever before."

item.title: Nvidia, Microsoft, Meta warn against 'premature restrictions' of open-weight models
item.description: Chinese open-weight models are gaining steam against leading offerings from American companies. OpenAI and Anthropic did not sign the letter.

item.title: Intel rides AI boom to fastest revenue growth in almost 15 years, but shares sink
item.description: Intel's revenue jumped 25%, the most robust growth for any period since the third quarter of 2011.

item.title: Pentagon lowers official Iran war death toll, omitting four killed this month
item.description: The Pentagon lowered its official Iran war death toll to 14 from 18, removing four service members killed this month.

item.title: Treasury yields retreat, 10-year stays near January 2025 highs
item.description: U.S. Treasury yields retreated on Friday after the 10-year briefly hit the highest level since January 2025 on Thursday.

item.title: Michael Burry's short bets on Tesla, Caterpillar pay off in big July pullback
item.description: Burry disclosed on June 30 that he had opened short positions in Caterpillar, Nvidia, Applied Materials and Tesla after each scored strong rallies.

item.title: Trump's new global tariff draws rebukes from trade partners over forced labor justification
item.description: U.S. trading partners have rejected the forced labor rationale behind Trump's new global tariffs, while most signaled plans to keep negotiating.

item.title: How a Chinese AI model stopped OpenAI’s ‘unprecedented’ cyber attack
item.description: The origin of the model Hugging Face used to combat the rogue AI is turning heads.

item.title: Russian attack cuts power to around 150,000 in Ukraine’s north as Kyiv hits missile, oil facilities
item.description: The update comes as Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy welcomed strikes on a key missile components facility in the Russian city of Kirov.

item.title: Boom in tech wealth is fueling record prices for dinosaur bones, art and watches, auction houses say
item.description: The major auction houses racked up nearly $10 billion in sales in the first half, marking one of the strongest-ever starts to the year.

item.title: As Honda CR-V leads U.S. sales, automaker teases new American-built pickup truck
item.description: The future of the Ridgeline midsize pickup truck had been in flux, and the automaker said there will be a temporary production stoppage for the truck.

item.title: Why Costco keeps gas prices so low—it's 'straight out of the retail playbook,' expert says
item.description: Higher gas prices are driving record demand for Costco's gas stations as more Americans look to save at the pump.

item.title: Here are Friday's biggest analyst calls of the day: Nvidia, SpaceX, Tesla, AMD, Intel, Dell, Apple, Meta & more
item.description: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Friday.

item.title: Oracle signs 10-year software contract with Pentagon worth up to $7 billion
item.description: Oracle will supply on-premises software to the U.S. Department of Defense.

item.title: Amazon cracks down on use of AI images by sellers after New York law
item.description: A recently enacted New York law mandates that companies disclose when an ad includes a "synthetic performer" in place of a human actor.

item.title: SpaceX shares are fully valued even when taking into account an Elon 'premium,' says HSBC
item.description: The Wall Street firm initiated coverage with a hold rating and a $115 price target.

item.title: Novo Nordisk pursues preliminary injunction to block Eli Lilly weight-loss drug ads
item.description: Denmark's Novo Nordisk said on Tuesday that it had sued Lilly, arguing consumers were being misled about how the companies' products compare.

item.title: Shortsighted stock market can no longer brush off war: 'It's too hard to ignore $100 oil'
item.description: After staying flat as the U.S.-Iran war heated up again, equities tumbled on Thursday after oil prices crossed $100 per barrel.

item.title: OpenAI's Hugging Face hack triggers 'AI Kill Switch' bill in Congress
item.description: OpenAI disclosed this week that some of its AI models went rogue and hacked into open-source developer platform Hugging Face.

item.title: The Club's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Friday
item.description: Intel shares gained after a blockbuster quarter, while Amkor was upgraded by UBS after an Nvidia partnership.

item.title: Switching to electric because of high gas prices? 3 ways to make your EV more affordable
item.description: Save on going electric with credit cards for charging and the best insurance policies for EVs.

item.title: TikTok charged with breaching EU tech rules on online safety for kids, EU says
item.description: ByteDance's TikTok has been charged with breaching EU online content rules due to design features that could expose children to predators or cyberbullying.

item.title: Southwest Airlines put Texas jet fuel on a boat to LA for the first time amid supply worries
item.description: Southwest hired a ship this spring to send fuel from Houston to Los Angeles in case of supply shortages.

item.title: U.S., other nations back open-source AI with 'strong security' at China summit
item.description: The APEC statement is the first to include open-source cooperation at a minister level, said Li Lecheng, China's industry and information technology minister.

item.title: Tesla, Alphabet lose hundreds of billions in value in post-earnings stock plunge
item.description: Both Tesla and Alphabet signaled higher spending as they invest in artificial intelligence.

item.title: Volkswagen CFO addresses plant closures, job losses as profits sink
item.description: German auto giant Volkswagen on Friday reported weaker-than-expected second-quarter profit and revised down its sales forecast for 2026.

item.title: South Korea's president invokes dramatic Japan realty crash to push domestic property agenda
item.description: Lee was highlighting the country's excessive investment in real estate, and highlighted that Japan's housing market "burst like a balloon."

item.title: U.S. to see higher generic drug prices thanks to tariffs, CEO of leading India pharma firm warns
item.description: CEO of Indian pharma company Dr Reddy's has warned that Trump's proposed tariffs on generic drugs will make them more expensive for patients.

item.title: Japan core inflation rate in June creeps up from 4-year low as higher oil prices bite
item.description: This is the first rise in core inflation since March, and was in line with the1.6% growth expected by economists polled by Reuters.
